create_first_project: Create your first project to get started
no_projects_desc: Create a project to organize your documents by case or matter.
no_docs_desc: Connect Google Drive or upload files to get started.
search_placeholder: What do you want to know?
memories_subtitle: What the assistant remembers about you
delete_all_confirm: Are you sure? This will delete all your memories.
memory_empty_hint: Memories are saved automatically during conversations
login_to_accept: Please sign in to accept this invite
no_obligations_desc: Obligations will be extracted automatically when contracts are indexed.
duplicate_file: This file has already been uploaded.
duplicate_file_name: A file with this name already exists.
learning_mode_desc: Show tips and guidance throughout the app to help you get the most out of Rastro.
no_project_obligations_desc: Obligations will appear here when contracts for this project are indexed.
hint_dashboard: Use the search bar to ask questions across all your documents. Click a stat card to explore that section.
hint_project: Upload documents to this project, then use the search bar to find answers scoped to this project only.
hint_chat: Chat with the assistant about your documents. It remembers context from previous conversations and uses your memories.
hint_memory: Memories help the assistant personalize responses. They are saved automatically from conversations, or you can add them manually.
hint_obligations: Obligations are deadlines and commitments extracted from your contracts. Use "Scan documents" to detect new ones.
hint_settings: Manage your team and preferences here. Turn off learning mode to hide these tips once you're comfortable.
clause_query_placeholder: Search for a clause type, e.g. limitation of liability...
clause_not_found: Clause not found in these contracts
select_up_to_5: Select up to 5 documents to compare side by side
no_clause_results: No results found. Try a different clause type.
hint_clause_comparison: Search for a clause type to compare it across all your contracts. Select documents to see them side by side, or export the results.
landing_meta_description: Rastro connects your contracts, emails, and documents in one place. Search, analyze, and manage deadlines with AI built for lawyers.
landing_cta_note: No credit card required. Set up in 2 minutes.
landing_hero_headline: The AI that knows your firm
landing_hero_subheadline: Rastro connects your contracts, emails, and documents. Ask in plain language, compare clauses, and never miss a deadline.
landing_problem_1_desc: Contracts in Drive, emails in Gmail, files in local folders. Finding what you need takes hours.
landing_problem_2_desc: Contract expirations, renewal windows, and critical dates buried in clauses nobody reviews.
landing_problem_3_desc: ChatGPT doesn't know your cases. You need answers from your documents, not general internet data.
landing_how_1_desc: Link Google Drive and Gmail, or upload files directly. Rastro indexes everything automatically.
landing_how_2_desc: Search in plain language across all your documents. Get answers with citations to original sources.
landing_how_3_desc: Rastro extracts obligations from your contracts and alerts you before they expire. Compare clauses across documents.
landing_feature_1_desc: Ask in plain language and get precise answers with direct citations to paragraphs in your contracts.
landing_feature_2_desc: Compare similar clauses across multiple contracts. Spot differences and missing clauses instantly.
landing_feature_3_desc: Automatic extraction of deadlines, expirations, and commitments. Never miss a critical date.
landing_feature_4_desc: An assistant that remembers context from previous conversations and adapts to your preferences.
landing_diff_headline: Not another ChatGPT. Not another vLex.
landing_diff_body: Generic AI tools don't know your documents. Legal databases search public case law, not your files. Rastro works exclusively with your firm's information: your contracts, your emails, your deadlines.
landing_proof_placeholder: Coming soon: testimonials from firms in our beta program.
landing_pricing_headline: Start free, grow with your team
landing_pricing_desc: Free plan to get started. Team plans available when you're ready. No long-term commitments.
landing_final_sub: Set up your account in under 2 minutes. No credit card required.
boe_disclaimer: Consolidated legislation — may have been updated
boe_disclaimer_full: BOE sources correspond to consolidated legislation from the Boletín Oficial del Estado. Always verify the current version at boe.es before making legal decisions.
